title: Savory Egyptian Chicken Kebabs
description: Tender and flavorful chicken skewers marinated in a mixture of aromatic spices and herbs, served with a rich garlic sauce. Perfect for a romantic dinner with a Mediterranean twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken cubes to the bowl and mix well to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the chicken kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, warm the garlic sauce in a small saucepan over low heat.
Serve the chicken kebabs hot with the warm garlic sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
